title: UIDatePicker Date Change Listener : Swift
summary: Adding an editing event to a UIDatePicker is something that is required most of the time. For views like UIDatePicker , we can connect an IBAction with the event type as value changed and get a callback for the value changed.
content: Adding an editing event to a UIDatePicker is something that is required most of the time. For views like UIDatePicker, we can connect an IBAction with the event type as value changed and get a callback for the value changed.
